name: Link Auto-Ingest
description: Automatically ingests new files dropped into ~/link/raw/ into the Link wiki

then.prompt: A new file was just added. Read ~/link/LINK.md for the ingest protocol, then ingest this new file into the wiki at ~/link/wiki/. Follow the full ingest workflow: create source page, create/update concept and entity pages, update index.md and log.md. Tag all claims with confidence levels.
